column18: Three-stage RAG pipeline (indexing, retrieval, generation) with two variants: (1) Textual RAG - chunks OCR tokens (L=60, overlap 10, tolerance 0.2), fine-tuned bge-en-small-v1.5 bi-encoder retrieves top-k'=20, bge-reranker-v2-m3 cross-encoder reranks to top-k=10, concatenates chunk text+boxes+image crop into generator (VT5 or Qwen2.5-VL-7B); (2) Visual RAG - vertical patches (P=512, overlap 256), Pix2Struct encodes patches + query (rendered as image), ColBERT-style late interaction selects top-k=5 patches, tiled as mini-patches for Pix2Struct generator
column19: Bi-encoder (bge-en-small-v1.5, ~33M) + Cross-encoder (bge-reranker-v2-m3, ~568M) + Generator (VT5 ~223M / Qwen2.5-VL-7B ~7000M / Pix2Struct ~282M); DIT for VT5 image crops
column21: Bi-encoder contrastive fine-tuned per dataset on query-chunk pairs (Multiple-Negatives Ranking Loss); VT5 fully fine-tuned (AdamW, lr=2e-4, 4 epochs); Qwen2.5-VL-7B LoRA (alpha=16, rank=8, dropout=0.05) on Q/V projections; Pix2Struct uses pre-existing dataset-fine-tuned weights
column24: Bi-encoder: MNR Loss contrastive with synthetic anchor-positive pairs (ANLS > 0.8 threshold); VT5: full fine-tuning; Qwen2.5-VL-7B: LoRA on Q/V; Pix2Struct: dataset-pretrained weights used directly

column6: page scoring backbone; patch encoder
column17: N/A
column18: Convert document to image fed into Pix2Struct; page scoring to retrieve relevant pages using self-attention
column19: Self-attention top-K retrieval + Pix2Struct VLM
column24: N/A

column6: contrastive visual embedding; VLM backbone; retrieve-then-read paradigm; parameter-efficient fine-tuning
column17: Phi3V (4.2B, primary) and Idefics3 (8B, alternative) for LLM backbone in VDocRetriever and as VDocGenerator for answer generation respectively
column18: 2 component RAG framework (VDocRetriever + VDocGenerator) , retriever uses pretrained LVLM to compress entire page images into dense EOS token embeddings aligned with OCR content
column19: LVLM based dual encoding of queries and document images, maximum inner product search for retrieval, top-K retrieved page images concatenated with question is used to generate answer autoregressively
column21: DocVQA, InfoVQA, VisualMRC, ChartQA, OpenWikiTable, DUDE, MPMQA, MHDocVQA
column23: VDocRetrieve pre-trained on 500K document image-OCR pairs using 2 objectives: RCR + RCG, LLM frozen, only LoRA + projector updated
column24: VDocRetriever fine-tuned with contrastive learning on OpenDocVQA query-document pairs, VDocGenerator fine tuned with next -token prediction on same dataset

column10: Note: ReAct is based on CoT, if Prompt Strategy is ReAct, just means paper specifically mentions ReAct

column7: Yes* = not fully OCR-dependent, OCR is just a component of the overall architecture, model can run without OCR with worse performance
No* = OCR not explicitly used at inference, but used during PT/IT as an explicit training step
